comparisons.interpretation: The pack reduced local bytes selected for context as shown by summary_by_variant bytes_saved_successful/token_proxy_saved_successful, but no provider primary token fields were measured, so this fixture does not support a hosted API token-savings claim.

caveat: Workflow example only. Proxy byte reductions are reported separately from matched-task token/cost metrics; token or cost savings require provider-measured primary token/cost fields on matched successful tasks. Wall time and provider cached-token fields are diagnostic telemetry, not proof of ContextGuard-caused savings. This example documents report shape only; make real savings claims only from your own matched successful task runs.
